claim_text: MOF光催化产氢的首次报道出现在2010年，而MOF实现全分解水(OWS)的首次报道是2017年在MIL-53(Al)-NH2中掺入Ni2+作为助催化剂。
大多数MOF光催化研究集中于使用牺牲电子供体的H2生成，而非更困难的水氧化过程，实现无牺牲剂的全分解水仍是核心挑战。
CFA-Zn MOF利用结晶学独立配体作为电子供体-受体对，引入Pt和Co3O4助催化剂后在可见光下产生H2和O2，稳定性超100小时，365nm处表观量子效率达3.09%。
UiO-66(Zr)-NH2@MIL-88B(Fe)异质外延MOF-on-MOF结构通过Z-scheme机制实现太阳能驱动全分解水，3小时内H2和O2产量分别达690和279 umol/g。
光电催化(PEC)产氢技术结合光催化和电催化优势，但MOF基PEC系统面临效率低和成本效益差的双重挑战。
原始MOF材料存在严重的电荷复合和稳定性差的问题。通过构建Schottky、Type-II、Z-scheme和S-scheme异质结可有效改善光生载流子分离。
MOF衍生的RuO2/N,S-TiO2(RTTA)异质结在自来水中产氢速率达8190 umol/h/g，表观量子产率达10.0%。
MOF基复合材料通过配体功能化、金属掺杂、异质结构建和等离子耦合等策略增强光吸收和电荷分离。
Ce基MOF(Ce-BDC-DABCO)用于含盐水光催化产氢，最大产氢速率达420.8 mmol/h/g，约为未修饰Ce-BDC的4倍。
p型Ni-TBAPy MOF剥离的2D纳米带水还原活性提高164倍，最优H2产率98 umol/h，420nm处AQE达8.0%。
通过上转换材料拓展光响应范围、降低带隙、利用等离子共振和光热效应，可实现MOF材料全光谱响应光催化产氢。
合理设计的MOF基光催化剂可实现产氢耦合选择性氧化反应，包括苄醇氧化、苄胺偶联和5-HMF氧化等。
MOF光催化产氢面临的主要挑战包括：光吸收范围窄、电荷复合严重、水稳定性差、量子效率低和规模化成本高。
MOF与Ti3C2 MXene的复合材料中，MXene作为电子受体可有效促进光生电荷分离，同时提供额外催化活性位点。
基于MOFs的异质结构光催化剂通过内建电场定向传输光生电子；三元复合体系可同时延展光响应、促进电荷分离和防止光腐蚀。
MOF基材料实现光催化全分解水的策略包括Z-scheme双半导体体系、助催化剂负载、配体工程和缺陷工程，但真正无牺牲剂的全分解水报道仍然稀少。
MOF及其衍生纳米材料提供长期稳定性、高效电荷分离传输和宽光吸收等优势。异质外延MOF-on-MOF复合光催化剂是前沿方向。
MOF材料绿色合成、结构解析和先进表征技术是推动光催化应用的基础。大规模低成本合成是未来发展方向。
MOF的可调节孔隙率、高比表面积和可修饰的有机配体使其成为光催化产氢的理想平台。不同金属节点（Zr、Ti、Fe等）对光吸收性质和催化活性有显著影响。
source_id: MVTE5NXQ

claim_text: 三配体Ti-MOF通过引入电子供体和受体配体实现配体到金属电荷转移(LMCT)能力的精细调控，光催化产氢速率达到传统双配体体系的3倍以上。
source_id: 9ERECZYV

claim_text: 供体-受体型MOF通过分子内电荷转移实现高效光生载流子分离，有机配体中D-A对的引入使产氢活性提升数个数量级。
source_id: QIRHYWSI

claim_text: 氢键有机框架(HOF)中微孔限域的激子转移机制主导光催化产氢过程，微孔尺寸与激子扩散长度的匹配是实现高效产氢的关键。
source_id: UACGHHQ2

claim_text: 原位质子化磷间隙掺杂策略可有效调控g-C3N4的电子结构，增强可见光吸收和光生载流子分离，该策略对MOF/g-C3N4复合体系同样适用。
source_id: 76M4JM9G

claim_text: 将金属有机框架嵌入脂质体中可实现全解水光催化，为MOF基光催化剂的界面工程提供了新策略。
通过空间分离助催化剂优化MOF基光催化剂，可显著提升全解水性能，实现高效的氢氧同步产生。
MOF/COF异质结中晶面调控的内建电场可有效促进光生载流子分离，实现高效全解水光催化。
室温条件下合成的Ce(IV)-MOF可同时驱动光催化产氢和产氧反应，在模拟太阳光下实现全解水。
金属有机框架作为光催化水分解材料具有可调节的带隙、高比表面积和丰富的活性位点等独特优势。
MOF-on-MOF复合结构以UiO-66为基础材料，在太阳光照射下展现出优异的全解水光催化活性。
密度泛函理论计算表明Cu-BTC金属有机框架具有适合全解水的电子结构和催化活性位点。
系统揭示了MOF在光催化全解水中的未开发潜力，提出了提升其光催化性能的关键策略和方向。
直接配体到簇的光激发机制主导了MOF中的高性能全解水过程，为理解MOF光催化机理提供了新视角。
金属有机框架在电催化和光催化水分解领域取得了重要进展，展现了从材料设计到器件集成的系统性发展。
MOF基催化剂在电化学和光电化学水分解中的应用取得显著进展，结构可调性和多孔特性是其核心优势。
水稳定镍基MOF纳米带无需助催化剂即可实现光催化产氢，突破了MOF水稳定性差的传统瓶颈。
新型多孔钛-方酸盐材料在模拟太阳光下表现出高效的全解水光催化活性，拓展了MOF光催化剂的金属节点选择范围。
二维MOF可作为产氢助催化剂促进全解水光催化反应，其层状结构有利于电荷传输和活性位点暴露。
MOF/MoS2复合光催化剂通过异质结构设计增强了光催化产氢性能，协同效应显著提升了载流子分离效率。
铈(III)-MOF展现出光催化产氢活性，稀土金属节点的引入为MOF光催化剂设计提供了新思路。

claim: MOFs can serve as photocatalysts for photo-catalytic water splitting, offering tunable pore structures and light absorption properties.
source_text: MOFs can serve as photocatalysts for photo-catalytic water splitting, offering tunable pore structures and light absorption properties.
title: Metal organic frameworks for photo-catalytic water splitting

claim: Heteroepitaxial MOF-on-MOF architecture enables efficient solar-driven overall water splitting through enhanced charge separation at epitaxial interfaces.
source_text: Heteroepitaxial MOF-on-MOF architecture enables efficient solar-driven overall water splitting through enhanced charge separation at epitaxial interfaces.
title: Heteroepitaxial MOF-on-MOF photocatalyst for solar-driven water splitting

claim: Mono/binary MOF structures function as photocatalysts for hydrogen production via water splitting with in situ H2 storage capability.
source_text: Mono/binary MOF structures function as photocatalysts for hydrogen production via water splitting with in situ H2 storage capability.
title: Hydrogen production and in situ storage through water splitting using mono/binary MOF structures as photocatalysts

claim: MOFs exhibit dual photocatalytic functionality for both water splitting and CO2 reduction, enabled by their tunable band structures and high surface areas.
source_text: MOFs exhibit dual photocatalytic functionality for both water splitting and CO2 reduction, enabled by their tunable band structures and high surface areas.
title: Metal-Organic Frameworks for Photocatalytic Water Splitting and CO2 Reduction

claim: ZnIn2S4/MOF S-scheme heterojunction achieves enhanced H2 production, with femtosecond transient absorption spectroscopy revealing ultrafast charge transfer dynamics at the heterojunction interface.
source_text: ZnIn2S4/MOF S-scheme heterojunction achieves enhanced H2 production, with femtosecond transient absorption spectroscopy revealing ultrafast charge transfer dynamics at the heterojunction interface.
title: ZnIn2S4/MOF S-scheme photocatalyst for H2 production and its femtosecond transient absorption mechanism

claim: Heterostructured MOF photocatalysts enable efficient hydrogen production via water splitting through optimized charge carrier dynamics at heterojunction interfaces.
source_text: Heterostructured MOF photocatalysts enable efficient hydrogen production via water splitting through optimized charge carrier dynamics at heterojunction interfaces.
title: Heterostructured MOFs photocatalysts for water splitting to produce hydrogen

claim: MOF-derived materials including metal oxides and carbon composites often outperform pristine MOFs as photocatalysts for water splitting due to improved stability and charge transport properties.
source_text: MOF-derived materials including metal oxides and carbon composites often outperform pristine MOFs as photocatalysts for water splitting due to improved stability and charge transport properties.
title: Metal-organic frameworks and their derivatives for photocatalytic water splitting

claim: 2D-on-3D MOF heterostructures achieve high photocatalytic H2 production rates by combining the efficient light harvesting of 2D MOFs with the structural stability of 3D frameworks.
source_text: 2D-on-3D MOF heterostructures achieve high photocatalytic H2 production rates by combining the efficient light harvesting of 2D MOFs with the structural stability of 3D frameworks.
title: Two-Dimensional-on-Three-Dimensional Metal-Organic Frameworks for Photocatalytic H2 Production

claim: Supramolecular MOFs integrating porphyrin photosensitizers and catalytic metal centers exhibit high activity for both homogeneous and heterogeneous photocatalytic H2 production.
source_text: Supramolecular MOFs integrating porphyrin photosensitizers and catalytic metal centers exhibit high activity for both homogeneous and heterogeneous photocatalytic H2 production.
title: Supramolecular metal-organic frameworks for homogeneous and heterogeneous photocatalytic H2 production

claim: MOF/MOF heterojunctions with type-II band alignment improve visible-light-driven hydrogen production by enabling efficient charge separation at the heterojunction interface.
source_text: MOF/MOF heterojunctions with type-II band alignment improve visible-light-driven hydrogen production by enabling efficient charge separation at the heterojunction interface.
title: Enhanced visible-light-driven hydrogen production through MOF/MOF heterojunctions

claim: Cd-TBAPy MOF is the first reported MOF active for both water reduction and oxidation under visible light; the apparent quantum efficiency for O2 evolution reaches 5.6% at 420 nm, much higher than previous MOF-based photocatalysts.
source_text: Cd-TBAPy MOF is the first reported MOF active for both water reduction and oxidation under visible light; the apparent quantum efficiency for O2 evolution reaches 5.6% at 420 nm, much higher than previous MOF-based photocatalysts.
title: Visible-Light-Responsive 2D Cadmium-Organic Framework Single Crystals with Dual Functions of Water Reduction and Oxidation

claim_text: Wolff et al.[100] used ultrafast TAS to demonstrate the selective attachment of reduction and oxidat: Wolff et al.[100] used ultrafast TAS to demonstrate the selective attachment of reduction and oxidation cocatalysts at spatially separated sites on the tips and side surfaces of CdS nanorods facilitated photocatalytic water splitting under visible light irradiation. Ultrafast TAS results indicated an efficient charge separation in the CdS nanorods followed by electron transfer to the Pt nanoparticles and hole transfer to the $\mathrm{Ru(tpy)(bpy)Cl_2}$ (RuDTC) molecular cocatalysts.
